Pristine Studded Leather Leggings  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: LEGS
AC: 12
DEX: +2 STA: +5
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Pristine Studded Leather Leggings
Lore Item No Trade
Slot: LEGS
AC: 12
DEX: +2 STA: +5
WT: 5.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Velious Leather 2
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Melany - Tunare
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 02:23:10
Page Updated:Sat Sep 7th, 2019

Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1
[Drops | Comments ]

befallen 1.0 - Guardian of T`Vyl

▲ Page top
Most curious
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2001 at 1:15 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763939769
168 posts
Of all the Pristine pieces to drop for me, the leggings have got to be the most common.

I have 3 of them thet thar leggins on three separate characters. I even had to let a pair rot (I would /shout their location, but that normally brought someone down to the third floor who was generally unaware of how dangerous this floor can be, even to level 40 types).

Khemosaabe "SPAM" Longbow (of Cazic Thule server)
Lvl 51 Ranger and Slayer-of-Bunny-Wabbits
"Dolphins are intelligent and friendly...on rye bread with mayonnaise <Eric Cartman>"
▲ Page top
RE: Most curious
QuoteReply
# Dec 12 2001 at 4:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966001431
22 posts
i had all the other pristine pieces on my rog except the leggings !!! camped for a week and never seen i t drop on drinal, everything just random
▲ Page top
Got Lucky?
QuoteReply
# Jul 09 2001 at 8:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757142046
37 posts
Went there with the exact intention of getting these leggings (i'd already gotten A Servant's Blade several days earlier). Spent about 1 hour down on third floor killing Guardians & Servants. Got another A Servant's Blade to drop (no use to me so I /ooc'ed it) and also got my leggings to drop. Then on my way out I also got A Guardian's Dagger to drop. Nice stats, but crap damage ratio.

Note: There are no guardians that look like they're wearing leather that i've seen. All guardians & servants are in their naked/cloth gear textures. My leggings dropped off a naked female dark elf.
▲ Page top
RE: Got Lucky?
QuoteReply
# Dec 04 2001 at 5:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248645137
53 posts
i could hardly imagine anything nicer than a naked dark elf female. Which textures do i have to set how ???

Freder
23rd halfling spy of the North
▲ Page top
RE: Got Lucky?
QuoteReply
# Aug 19 2001 at 4:24 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591749931919
Scholar
97 posts
Because you either haven't got the Velious expansion or the Velious armor textures are turned off :P
▲ Page top
Very Low Drop Rate
QuoteReply
# Jul 06 2001 at 6:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755077746
5 posts
I've camped the Guardians of T'Vyl in Befallen from TWO days now--I've killed hundreds of them and have seen exactly ONE drop, some Pristine Studded Arms. Unless they increase the drop rates, don't bother going there with the hopes of getting any gear. That place is extremely dangerous now and very hard to keep under control even with the help of a high 40s healer!
▲ Page top
Valizrae D`whatever
QuoteReply
# Jun 28 2001 at 5:32 PM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
We had her down to the V in her name, only to find that she repops that zone at 5k health. it took a very long time to get her that low, but it was still fun. This way can also be used to repop all the named mobs after she gets low enough.. also, anyone have any clue why the baron procs the yak proc, but his sword does not have the effect?
▲ Page top
i dont think you understand
QuoteReply
# Jun 28 2001 at 2:36 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1593965894134
6 posts
just because it says its a common drop, doesnt mean its commonly dropped, it means that its whatever that mob would most commonly drop. on an average this item is its most commonly dropped item, it doesnt mean its commonly dropped, it means its the mobs common drop.
▲ Page top
RE: i dont think you understand
QuoteReply
# Jul 25 2001 at 12:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752302213
27 posts
Well these mobs drop stones (malachite, onyx, agates, jade) more often that leathers or daggers.

Items should be upgraded to rare.
▲ Page top
Not that common
QuoteReply
# Jun 28 2001 at 1:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757781780
7 posts
I was in Befallen for about 3 hours last night and didnt see any of these drop at all. It was me (a 38 warrior) and a 44 shadowknight and we were killing EVERYRTHING in sight. only armor we saw drop in that time was the bracers
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 28 2001 at 2:38 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Farmers... :P

# Mar 28 2002 at 11:53 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591771103609
36 posts
Maybe they were there just to have fun? I know that I love to do that with lower lvl zones that give me no xp... =)
▲ Page top
RE: Not that common
QuoteReply
# Jun 28 2001 at 2:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761912254
135 posts
I looted the arms off a Guardian of T`Vyl in the hall near Valizrae D`megahps. They seem to only drop off the Guardians, but are fairly rare. Kill the ones in armor, not the ones in robes, and you should have a better chance at it. But yes, in about 20-30 kills, that was the only piece I saw also.
